projectDescription: A free, full-featured Computer Aided Dispatch (CAD) platform built specifically for ER:LC roleplay communities on Roblox.
keyFeatures: Live dispatch board with real-time call and unit management
Police MDT with plate lookup, warrants, BOLOs, and arrest records
Discord OAuth login and full audit log integration
PRC API integration for live player positions on dispatch map
911 Event Webhook for instant in-game call routing
Multi-department support (Police, Fire/EMS, DOT) with custom roles
Completely free — no paywalls, no premium tiers
Bodycam and radio features during active sessions
Session isolation and role-based access control
publicApiSurface: PRC API key integration (Manage Server → Integrations)
911 Event Webhook (PRC Event Webhook → Kova Hub)
Police MDT (plate lookup, warrants, BOLOs, citations, arrest reports)
Role and permission management per department
